name: Chocolate Truffle Cake
recipeIngredient: Confectioners sugar for Sprinkling over cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Oil the bottom of an 8-inch or 9-inch spring form pan.
2. Melt chocolate and butter in a low 200 degree oven for 10 minutes, or until melted.
3. Add flour, sugar, and water; blend well.
4. Add egg yolks one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites until stiff.
6. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the chocolate mixture.
7. Turn batter into the prepared pan and bake for 15 minutes in the middle of a 425-degree oven.
8. Let cake cool completely.
9. Sift or sprinkle powdered sugar over the top of the cooled cake.
10. Whip cream, vanilla, and confectioners sugar until soft peaks form. The whipped cream may be served thickly spread on top of the cake or in a separate bowl.
